news.t: Best Impact Investing ETFs for Q4 2020

holdings.infoBox: SDG is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 6.44%, First Solar at 4.51%, Wiwynn at 4.13%, Novartis AG at 3.97%, and NVIDIA at 3.64%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Global Sustainable Development Goals ETF (SDG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI ACWI Sustainable Development index. The fund tracks an index composed of companies whose revenues are driven by products and services that address at least one of the United Nation's Sustainable Development Goals. SDG was launched on Apr 20, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.
